chapter_title.ar: باب شَهَادَةِ الشَّرِيكِ وَ الْأَجِيرِ وَ الْوَصِيِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – The testimony of the partner, and the employee, and the trustee

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/245)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/245)

parts.text: عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ ثَلَاثَةِ شُرَكَاءَ شَهِدَ اثْنَانِ عَلَى وَاحِدٍ قَالَ لَا يَجُوزُ شَهَادَتُهُمَا .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, and Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Bin Sama’at, both together from Ahmad Bin Al Hassan Al Maysami, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Abdullah who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about three partners, two testified against one. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Both their testimonies are not allowed’.
en.sarwar: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash‘ariy has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa and Humayd ibn Ziyad from af-Hassan ibn Muhammad ibn Sama‘ah all from Ahmad ibn al-Hassan al-Mithamiy from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn abu ‘Abd Allah who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of three partners of whom two have testified against one. He (the Imam) said, ‘Their testimony is not admissible. ’”
